sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Looking at the image, the player is now at the top left of the maze. I can see a white square below the player. Let me check the area below to find the path DOWN through the white corridor.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check player position and area below
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
blue_player = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24]
p = blue_player[0]['boundary']
r_min, r_max = p[0][0], p[2][0]
c_min, c_max = p[0][1], p[2][1]

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"Player at rows {r_min}-{r_max}, cols {c_min}-{c_max}")
print(f"\nArea below player (rows {r_max}-{r_max+15}, cols {c_min-2}-{c_max+2}):")
for i in range(r_max, min(63, r_max+16)):
    print(f"{i:2d}: {ascii_lines[i][max(0,c_min-2):min(64,c_max+2)]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
